## Runtime.RuntimeUsage class

A resolved view of a recipe usage record with linked versions.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RuntimeUsage 
```

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `RuntimeUsage` class.
